report.summary: Cycle-close: 2 new learn guides built (Lido v3 stVaults + Institutional Crypto Adoption). REGRESSION: TS errors jumped 46→142 due to new lido-v3-stvaults page (94 new errors). Git locks Day 10 — 799 uncommitted files. All 6 API routes structurally healthy.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 2 new pages built this cycle: /learn/lido-v3-stvaults-guide-2026 and /learn/institutional-crypto-adoption-guide-2026 — both page.tsx files confirmed present

REGRESSION: TypeScript errors jumped 46→142 (net +96). Breakdown: lido-v3-stvaults-guide-2026 (94 errors), institutional-crypto-adoption-guide-2026 (2 errors) — both likely JSX escaping issues matching existing pattern
Pre-existing errors unchanged: structured-data.examples.ts (40), crypto-arbitrage-strategies (4), crypto-index-funds (2)
Published slugs: 515 entries / 496 unique — unchanged from previous cycle
Page audit: 103 published slugs still missing page.tsx files — unchanged
Build will still succeed due to ignoreBuildErrors: true in next.config.ts, but error surface is growing
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 0 items remaining — drained

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 public API routes present: /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields
Could not live-test endpoints (WebFetch blocked for degen0x.com) — structural audit only
Cache TTLs verified in code: prices (60s/swr:120s), trending (300s/swr:600s), fear-greed (600s/swr:1200s), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (300s/swr:600s), defi-yields (300s dynamic)
Rate limiter: 0/6 core API routes wired to checkRateLimit (only /api/health uses it) — carry-over P1
CoinGecko free tier risk persists — no API key configured
No code changes to API routes this cycle

sections.title: DevOps
items: Git lock files persist: .git/HEAD.lock (Mar 16) + .git/index.lock (Mar 16) — DAY 10 of blocker
799 uncommitted files (up from 795 in previous cycle — 4 new files from 2 guide pages)
48 files changed vs last commit (e999560) with 4,381 insertions / 3,464 deletions
Last deployed commit: e999560 (Mar 17) — 'publish: promote 2 pages to production (Day 62)'
Deploy gap: ~170+ pages built locally but not live in production — Day 8 since last push
next.config.ts has ignoreBuildErrors: true — Vercel builds bypass TS errors
CRITICAL: Jefe must manually run: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock && git add -A && git commit && git push

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: 2 learn guides — Lido v3 stVaults Guide 2026 + Institutional Crypto Adoption Guide 2026
NEW REGRESSION: TS errors tripled (46→142) from new pages — should be fixed before next deploy
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 0 items (drained). Content pipeline needs refill for next cycle.
TODAY'S REPORTS SO FAR: standup×4, build×3, community×4, design×4, publish×4, eod×4 = 23 reports
CARRY-OVER [P0]: Git locks Day 10 — 799 files, ~170+ page deploy gap. Jefe action required.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 103 published slugs missing page.tsx (Day 1 pillars: wallets, taxes, investing, learn fundamentals)
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 142 TS errors across 5 files — growing, JSX escaping issues (was 46 last cycle)
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter coverage 0/6 core API routes
CARRY-OVER [P2]: Duplicate slugs in published-pages.ts (515 entries but only 496 unique)
NEXT CYCLE: Fix new TS regressions, refill PUBLISH_QUEUE, scaffold missing Day 1 pillar pages
